info.name: Plavist Server API
info.description: Complete API collection for Plavist HR Platform. Login first — the token is saved automatically to the collection variable `authToken`.

item.name: Get All Users with Stats (Super Admin)

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Senior Full Stack Developer",
  "description": "We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer to join our engineering team. You will be responsible for building and maintaining web applications using React and Node.js. Strong understanding of MongoDB, REST APIs, and cloud deployment is required.",
  "mode": "remote",
  "workType": "full-time",
  "experienceLevel": "senior-level",
  "applicationDeadline": "2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "skills": ["javascript", "react", "nodejs", "mongodb", "express", "typescript", "aws", "docker", "git"],
  "location": {
    "address": "123 Tech Park",
    "city": "Bangalore",
    "state": "Karnataka",
    "zip": "560001"
  },
  "salary": 120000,
  "disclosed": true,
  "equity": 0.5,
  "status": "published"
}

formdata.value: I am passionate about full-stack development and have 5 years of experience with React and Node.js.

request.description: Upload a PDF resume file in the 'resume' field. Set the file path in the 'src' of the resume form-data entry.

exec: // The shortlist response doesn't directly return the interview token.
// Check your server logs or the interviews endpoint for the token.

request.description: Shortlists the application AND automatically schedules an AI interview. Check server logs for the interview URL/token.
First call — send empty body or no message. AI starts the interview with a greeting and asks the first question. No JWT needed.
Subsequent calls — send candidate's answer in message. AI evaluates and responds with next question, follow-up, or ends the interview. Same endpoint as start.
Manually end the interview. Queues the final AI analysis, sends a completion email to the candidate, and returns time taken.
Get the AI settings for the logged-in user's company. Returns null with usingDefaults: true if no custom settings saved yet.
Create or update AI settings for the company. You can send any combination of the three sections: interview, resumeAnalyser, finalAnalyser.
Delete custom AI settings — the system will use defaults for everything.
Get all available skills from the platform (derived from the Jobs model enum). Public — no auth required.
Full company dashboard — job stats, application stats, interview stats, charts data (jobs with applications, applications by status, applications over 30 days), and recent items.
Platform-wide dashboard — total users, companies, jobs, applications, interviews, charts by status, top companies, applications over 30 days, recent users and applications.

item.name: Waitlist
item.description: Waitlist + Early Access payment system. While waitlist is active, register/login are blocked. Super admin can toggle waitlist, set price, manage entries.

request.description: Returns whether waitlist is active, the early access price (in paise), and the cal.com booking URL.
Sign up for the waitlist. Returns entry with _id. Duplicate emails return existing entry.
Check waitlist + payment status for a given email.
Creates a Razorpay order for the early access fee. Returns orderId, amount, currency, and keyId to initialise the Razorpay checkout on the frontend.
Verifies the Razorpay payment signature. On success, marks the entry as paid and returns the cal.com booking URL for the frontend to redirect to.
Returns all platform config keys: waitlist_active, early_access_price, cal_booking_url.
Update platform config. Set waitlist_active=false to open registration. early_access_price is in paise (49900 = ₹499). Set cal_booking_url to your cal.com link.
Stats: total, pending, paid, approved, rejected, total revenue in paise and rupees.
Paginated list of all waitlist entries. Filter by status (pending/paid/approved/rejected), paymentStatus, or search by name/email.
Marks the entry as approved and sets earlyAccessGrantedAt timestamp.
